title: Supply Chain Manager - Shadowfax - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Shadowfax - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
